metadata.name: SKINgenius Knowledge Graph
metadata.build_strategy: Systematic extraction from research reports with evidence grading and source citations

node_types.Condition: Skin conditions with ICD-10 codes, severity levels, and Fitzpatrick considerations
node_types.RootCause: Internal health factors (gut dysbiosis, insulin resistance, hormonal imbalance)
node_types.Mechanism: Biological pathways (inflammation, sebum overproduction, collagen breakdown)
node_types.Treatment: Products, supplements, lifestyle changes, professional procedures
node_types.Ingredient: Active skincare ingredients with evidence levels, safety profiles, Fitzpatrick considerations
node_types.Medication: Drugs that affect skin with interactions and contraindications
node_types.Nutrient: Vitamins, minerals, supplements with dosing and evidence
node_types.RiskFactor: Pregnancy, age, skin type, medications, allergies
